headline: Jim Cramer on Agilent: “There Might Be an Opportunity”
summary: Agilent Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:A) was among the stocks Jim Cramer was focused on, as he discussed Mad Money’s latest game plan for the week. headline: Agilent Q2 Earnings Call Shows Ignite Driving a Higher Outlook
summary: A beat Q2 estimates and raised its fiscal 2026 outlook. It says its Ignite operating system is driving more durable gains in pricing, execution and margins.
